message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.apply('prod', axis=0) parity (br-frankenpandas-lwu8)

Extends DataFrame::apply_named axis=0 match arm with 'prod' and the
'product' alias, routed through Series::prod(). Matches
pd.DataFrame.apply('prod', axis=0) returning a Series indexed by
column name. 3 new tests: matches Series::prod per column (with
negative-value coverage) and 'product' alias parity, empty-frame
emits identity 1.0, null-skip parity with Series::prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
